dashboard.png.description: Dashboard showing recent resources with colorful thumbnails, descriptions, owner groups, and download FAB
dashboard.png.seedDetails: 12 groups with hierarchy, 13 resources with generated images, 8 notes with blocks, 12 tags

grid-view.png.description: Resource grid view with thumbnails, tag filter pills (FAVORITE, LANDSCAPE), sort/filter sidebar, and Select All button

upload-form.png.description: Create resource form with file upload, URL download, tags/groups/notes relation fields, and owner picker

group-detail.png.description: Photography group detail showing description, owned notes (Landscape Photography Tips), tags (FAVORITE, REFERENCE), and merge tools

search-results.png.description: Filtered resource search results matching 'sunset' with thumbnail and metadata

query-editor.png.description: Saved query detail page showing SQL query for Recent Large Resources with Run button

activity-log.png.description: Activity log table showing timestamped entries for resource uploads, note creation, and group operations

group-list.png.description: Groups listing page with List/Text/Tree view tabs, category labels (Media, Document, Location, Project, Person), and filter sidebar

resource-detail-view.png.description: Resources in table/detail view showing ID, name, preview thumbnail, file size, and creation date columns

note-edit.png.description: Note edit form with populated title, text, tags chips (important, in-progress), groups chip (Web App Redesign), and owner (Work Projects)

group-edit.png.description: Group edit form with populated name, description, tags, category selector, and meta editor

category-list.png.description: Category management page with 6 categories: Person, Location, Business, Project, Media, Document

plugin-management.png.seedDetails: 3 plugins: example-blocks (enabled), example-plugin (enabled, with settings), fal-ai (disabled, with API key)
